name: Forgejo UI Workbench (desktop)

upstream.name: Forgejo
upstream.note: Desktop workbench shells core; does not run a second Forgejo process

description: Desktop workbench for Forgejo core: dedicated WebView/Chromium --app window + local API workbench (list/create repos). ui_face=desktop_workbench. NOT the 1.0.0 launcher-only xdg-open package. Depends org.forgejo.Forgejo.core. Does not claim pixel-complete upstream GUI rewrite.
